title: GrowGeneration Reports First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
text: Q1 net sales rose to $38.4M while loss shrank to $4.9M. Quarterly Revenue: $38.39 million versus an estimate of $37.18 million. This marks the second consecutive quarter of year-over-year revenue growth, driven by continued strength in the commercial B2B division and the benefits of a more focused operating footprint. The company reaffirmed its full-year 2026 guidance for net revenue of $162 million to $168 million and approximately break-even adjusted EBITDA. For the second quarter of 2026, the Company expects total consolidated net sales in the range of $42 million to $44 million, representing continued sequential growth. Management expects net revenue of $42 million to $44 million and a return to positive adjusted EBITDA. The structural actions taken to streamline the cost base are translating into meaningful financial improvement, with a $2.4 million year-over-year improvement in Adjusted EBITDA and a $4.5 million reduction in GAAP net loss. Proprietary brands hit 37% and cash reached $41.1M.
